field.name: receipt_status
field.decoration-danger: date_planned and (date_planned < effective_date or date_planned < datetime.datetime.combine(datetime.date.today(), datetime.time(0,0,0)).to_utc().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') and receipt_status!='full' and effective_date <= date_planned)
field.decoration-warning: date_planned and date_planned >= datetime.datetime.combine(datetime.date.today(), datetime.time(0,0,0)).to_utc().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') and date_planned <= datetime.datetime.combine(datetime.date.today(), datetime.time(23,59,59)).to_utc().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') and receipt_status!='full'

xpath.attribute: date_planned and (date_planned < effective_date or date_planned < datetime.datetime.combine(datetime.date.today(), datetime.time(0,0,0)).to_utc().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') and receipt_status!='full' and effective_date <= date_planned)
